answer.recommendation: Для запроса в компетенции PT_2.6 manuals указывают, что выбор метода sand control должен сравнивать screen, gravel pack и chemical consolidation с учетом production rate, completion constraints и ожидаемого sanding risk.
justification: Method selection should compare screen, gravel pack, and chemical consolidation. [Sand Control Design, p. 18]
Design basis must include production rate, completion constraints, and reservoir strength. [Sand Control Design, p. 18]
limitations: Финальный выбор метода остается предварительным до уточнения недостающих инженерных параметров.

claims.claim_text: Method selection should compare screen, gravel pack, and chemical consolidation.
claims.relevance_reason: Defines method selection criteria from the manual.
